validation_gates.reason: Repository identity, push permission, immutable base, target blob, separate review-branch route, two-file change budget, and non-goals were resolved before mutation.
Directory Rules sections 4, 5, 15, and 16 were extracted, rendered, and visually inspected. The existing packages source-envelope path was preserved and no parallel authority was introduced.

No matching open pull request or temporal-source README branch was found. Main was pinned at eac8668 after PR 1496 and a subsequent unrelated fixtures documentation merge; the target blob remained unchanged.
Direct reads confirmed kfm-temporal version 0.0.0, an empty __init__.py, a comment-only core.py, a placeholder temporal_window validator, and no declared package-local test command.
The schema, proposed ADR-0014, and draft time-awareness doctrine use non-equivalent vocabularies. The README preserves the conflict and selects no new authority.

The Directory Rules README order, source responsibility, trust membrane, lifecycle discipline, validation burden, correction, and rollback intent were preserved while unsupported implementation claims were removed.
The README has one H1, consecutive heading levels, unique slugs, a closed metadata wrapper, balanced fences, no trailing whitespace, a final newline, and no detected credential pattern.
All twenty unique repository-relative link targets resolved by direct GitHub reads on main.
The documentation contains no credentials, restricted payloads, living-person or genomic data, protected locations, or release/publication action.
The receipt parsed as JSON and validated against the checked-in generated-receipt schema.
The connector provides serialized Contents API writes but no readable base-tree metadata for a safe inherited multi-file tree. Writes will be serialized on a scoped branch with readback.
This is an API-only documentation change and the package declares no confirmed package-local test command.
The receipt is emitted before remote writes; branch, files, hashes, changed paths, pull request metadata, and workflows require post-mutation verification.
Human review remains pending and separate from generation and static validation.
